prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次依次约 10947→10568→8500→20002→8392。2023 年位次大幅前移至 8500 名，2024 年因新高考选科分组（物理+不限组）出现位次骤降至 20002 名，2025 年恢复至 8392 名。近 3 年（2023–2025）位次波动剧烈，2025 年基准约 8392 名；本省理科/物理类计划 2021–2025 年依次为 128→127→127→125→128 人，基本稳定在 125–128 人之间；2026 年计划大幅增至 164 人，较 2025 年扩招约 28.1%，扩招幅度显著，预计将明显拉低位次（位次数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名 2021 年第 67 名→2024 年第 60 名→2026 年第 73 名，近年排名在 60–73 名区间波动，整体处于中上 211 水平；该校在声誉文件中未出现，说明近年无明显重大舆情事件；抖音热度未进入前 100 名，短视频平台曝光度一般，报考关注度相对平稳；第五轮学科评估数据中未收录该校，但该校以石油石化特色著称，石油与天然气工程、地质资源与地质工程 等为传统优势领域，相关专业对考生有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门工科专业社会热度持续偏高，该校相关专业（计算机、 自动化、电气等）受益于整体工科热度；本省 2026 年考生总数 218700 人，按近年物理类占比约 67% 估算，物理类考生约 14.65 万人，较 2025 年 12.14 万人增长约 20.7%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争加剧；省控线 2025 年物理类本科批 374 分、特殊类型线 475 分，较 2024 年（370/488）略有变化，整体平稳；该校位于山东青岛，属于东部沿海城市，对西北省份考生有一定地域吸引力；甘肃省距山东较远，但 211 层次对甘肃考生仍有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 8392 名、2026 年大幅扩招约 28.1%（位次数字增大）、本省物理类考生增长约 20.7%（竞争加剧，位次数字减小）以及工科专业热度持续偏高等因素，扩招效应大于考生增长效应，预计 2026 年最低位次较 2025 年明显后移。预测最低位次约 10060 名，区间 9560–10560 名。

- 自动化。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 9560–10560 名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（石油工程、软件工程、通信工程等），一档专业（计算机、电气、电子信息）作为冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（<9560 名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>10560 名）建议以三档专业保底，同时关注二档中位次相对较低的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 10947→10568→8500→20002→8392. In 2023, the ranking significantly advanced to 8500, while in 2024, due to the new college entrance examination subject grouping (physics + unrestricted group), the ranking plummeted to 20002, recovering to 8392 in 2025. Over the past three years (2023–2025), rankings fluctuated sharply, with a baseline of about 8392 in 2025; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 128→127→127→125→128, remaining stable between 125–128; the 2026 plan significantly increased to 164, an expansion of about 28.1% compared to 2025, which is expected to notably lower the ranking (increase the ranking number).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, it was 67th in 2021→60th in 2024→73rd in 2026, fluctuating in the 60–73 range in recent years, overall at an upper-middle 211 level; the university did not appear in reputation documents, indicating no major public opinion incidents in recent years; Douyin popularity did not enter the top 100, with general exposure on short video platforms, and application attention relatively stable; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data did not include this university, but it is renowned for its petroleum and petrochemical specialties, with petroleum and natural gas engineering, geological resources and geological engineering as traditional advantageous fields, and related majors have stable appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering continue to have high social heat; the university's related majors (computer science, automation, electrical engineering) benefit from overall engineering heat; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is 218,700, with physics category accounting for about 67% in recent years, estimating about 146,500 physics candidates, an increase of about 20.7% from 121,400 in 2025, significantly increasing competition; the provincial control line in 2025 for physics undergraduate batch was 374 points, special type line 475 points, slightly changed from 2024 (370/488), overall stable; the university is located in Qingdao, Shandong, an eastern coastal city, with some regional appeal to candidates from northwestern provinces; Gansu Province is far from Shandong, but the 211 level still has strong appeal to Gansu candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 8392, a significant enrollment expansion of about 28.1% in 2026 (increasing ranking number), a provincial physics candidate increase of about 20.7% (intensifying competition, decreasing ranking number), and sustained high heat for engineering majors, the expansion effect outweighs the candidate growth effect, so the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to shift significantly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 10060, with a range of 9560–10560.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 9560–10560, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Petroleum Engineering, Software Engineering, Communication Engineering, etc.) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Electronic Information) as a stretch; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<9560), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>10560), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also paying attention to relatively lower-ranking majors in Tier 2.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名约第 73 名，理工类院校对文科考生吸引力相对有限；该校声誉平稳，无明显负面舆情；抖音热度未进入前 100 名，整体关注度一般。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 文科类专业 （汉语言文学、英语）社会热度分化观望，经济学类分化观望；本省 2026 年考生总数 218700 人，按近年历史类占比约 33% 估算，历史类考生约 7.22 万人，较 2025 年 5.84 万人增长约 23.6%，考生规模增加，竞争加剧；山东青岛地理位置对甘肃考生有一定吸引力，但文科招生专业少、计划数少，报考热度受限于招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 1859 名、2026 年扩招约 28.6%（位次数字增大）以及本省历史类考生增长约 23.6%（竞争加剧，位次数字减小），扩招效应略大于考生增长效应，预计 2026 年最低位次较 2025 年小幅后移。预测最低位次约 2240 名，区间 2130–2350 名。

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 73rd; as a science and engineering university, its appeal to liberal arts students is relatively limited; the university's reputation is stable with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity not in the top 100, overall attention is average.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors (Chinese Language and Literature, English) have divided social popularity, Economics also divided; total number of examinees in the province for 2026 is 218,700, with History Category accounting for about 33% in recent years, estimated at about 72,200 students, an increase of about 23.6% from 58,400 in 2025, leading to intensified competition; Qingdao, Shandong's geographical location has some appeal to Gansu students, but liberal arts majors are few and enrollment numbers are small, so application enthusiasm is limited by enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 1859, the 2026 expansion of about 28.6% (ranking number increases), and the increase in provincial History Category examinees of about 23.6% (intensified competition, ranking number decreases), the expansion effect slightly outweighs the examinee growth effect, so the 2026 minimum ranking is expected to shift slightly backward compared to 2025. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 2240, range 2130–2350.
